class.name: BaseShader
class.brief_description: Abstract class that includes basic setup and boilerplate functions for creating a post-process effect.
class.description: This class is used as the base class for all of the post-process shaders within GodotStylizedShadersPlugin. It includes basic setup functions and boilerplate functions, which made it easier to create post-process effects.

method.name: construct
method.description: Boilerplate setup function that initializes the derived [b]CompositorEffect[/b] instance (e.g. setting the effect callback type and the enabled status) and initializes the shader member variables.

method.name: init_compute
method.description: Initializes the [b]CompositorEffect[/b] pipeline (which uses compute shaders) by giving it a ".glsl" shader path, and if it is valid the basic setup for the creation/initialization of the shader is queued on Godot's render thread.

method.name: get_addon_path
method.description: Returns the Godot resource path to the [b]{GodotStylizedShadersPlugin}[/b] directory.

method.name: create_shader
method.description: Boilerplate function that once given the correct path and a pair of RIDs (which one needs for a shader with a [b]CompositorEffect[/b]), creates and initializes a shader based on the given shader file. This method is mostly used in classes derived from [b]{BaseShader}[/b] that have to skip most of the boilerplate setup (e.g. using [b]init_compute[/b], etc.), as they require multiple passes for instance.

method.name: free_shader
method.description: Boilerplate function that correctly deallocates the default shader stored in the BaseShader class (used for single pass effects).

method.name: free_rid
method.description: Boilerplate function that correctly deallocates the given RID.

methods.method:
<return type="Ref"/>
Boilerplate function that returns the sampler ([b]sampler2D[/b] in GLSL) uniform from a shader with the given parameters.

<return type="Ref"/>
Boilerplate function that returns the image ([b]image2D[/b] in GLSL) uniform from a shader with the given parameters.

<return type="Ref"/>
Boilerplate function that returns the buffer uniform (storage buffer) from a shader with the given parameters.

method.name: queue_callable_on_render_thread
method.description: Boilerplate function that queues the given [b]Callable[/b] on Godot's render thread.

method.name: push_back_callable
method.description: Function that attaches the provided [b]Callable[/b] to a container of [b]Callable[/b]s, which can be executed (if the container is not empty) during the render loop in [b]base_compute_update[/b].

methods.method:
<param index="2" name="buffers" type="Ref"/>
Boilerplate function that is used with the provided arguments in [b]_render_callback[/b], a function that needs to be overriden in any [b]CompositorEffect[/b]-derived class.

<param index="1" name="render_scene_buffers" type="Ref"/>
Boilerplate function that returns the internal size of the provided buffers. To execute this, you also need to provide the pointer to [b]RenderData[/b].

members.member: RenderingDevice fetched from Godot's RenderingServer, as this is needed everywhere within the CompositorEffect pipeline. Since this is a protected member variable, it can be used in all derived classes.
Protected member variable of type RID that is used in single-pass effects throughout GodotStylizedShadersPlugin as the main shader.

Protected member variable of type RID that is used in single-pass effects throughout GodotStylizedShadersPlugin as the main pipeline. Pipelines get freed together with their shader (in this case, m_shader).
